category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT radio devices including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular-enabled products exported from China to Russia, covering Roskomnadzor spectrum regulation, EAEU EAC conformity requirements, national GOST-R technical standards, and cybersecurity obligations.

title.en: China-to-Russia Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (Roskomnadzor / EAC)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入俄罗斯：Roskomnadzor / EAC合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入俄羅斯：Roskomnadzor / EAC合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Russian requirements under Roskomnadzor (Federal Service for Supervision of Communications, Information Technology and Mass Communications) and the Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU) EAC conformity framework, covering EAC Declaration of Conformity under TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio equipment), TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), and TR EAEU 004/2011 (low-voltage electrical safety), Roskomnadzor radio frequency interference (RFI) permit for consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth devices, 5 GHz W52/W53 indoor-only restrictions, 220 V/50 Hz European-plug (Type C/F) electrical grid requirements, FSTEC cybersecurity certification for regulated sectors, and Federal Law 149-FZ data localization obligations for connected devices.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与俄罗斯Roskomnadzor（联邦通信、信息技术和大众传媒监督局）及欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）EAC合规框架要求的差距对照，涵盖TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电设备）、TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低压电气安全）下的EAC合格声明、消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙设备的Roskomnadzor无线电干扰（RFI）许可、5GHz W52/W53室内限用要求、220V/50Hz欧标插头（C/F型）电气规格要求、FSTEC对监管行业的网络安全认证，以及联网设备适用的第149-FZ号联邦法律数据本地化义务。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與俄羅斯Roskomnadzor（聯邦通信、信息技術和大眾傳媒監督局）及歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）EAC合規框架要求的差距對照，涵蓋TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電設備）、TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低壓電氣安全）下的EAC合格聲明、消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙設備的Roskomnadzor無線電干擾（RFI）許可、5GHz W52/W53室內限用要求、220V/50Hz歐標插頭（C/F型）電氣規格要求、FSTEC對監管行業的網路安全認證，以及聯網裝置適用的第149-FZ號聯邦法律數據本地化義務。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Russia's and the EAEU's regulatory frameworks for wireless devices are subject to change, and enforcement practices may differ from published rules. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current requirements with qualified regulatory professionals and the relevant authorities (Roskomnadzor, FSTEC, Mintsifry, the Eurasian Economic Commission, and accredited EAC conformity assessment bodies) before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。俄罗斯及EAEU无线设备监管框架可能有所变化，实际执法可能与已发布规定存在差异。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货前，应与合格监管专业人士及相关主管机构（Roskomnadzor、FSTEC、Mintsifry、欧亚经济委员会及经认可EAC合规评估机构）核验现行要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。俄羅斯及EAEU無線設備監管框架可能有所變化，實際執法可能與已發布規定存在差異。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨前，應與合格監管專業人士及相關主管機構（Roskomnadzor、FSTEC、Mintsifry、歐亞經濟委員會及經認可EAC合規評估機構）核驗現行要求。

answer_first.en: Wireless devices entering Russia require an EAC Declaration of Conformity covering TR EAEU 037/2016 (radio equipment), TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), and TR EAEU 004/2011 (low-voltage electrical safety), with the EAC mark affixed. A Roskomnadzor radio frequency interference (RFI) permit or notification is required for consumer Wi-Fi and Bluetooth products. Devices with 5 GHz W52 (5.15–5.25 GHz) or W53 (5.25–5.35 GHz) bands must carry an indoor-use-only restriction label. The electrical grid is 220–230 V/50 Hz with Type C/F plugs. Chinese CE, CCC, and FCC documentation are not recognised. A local authorised importer or representative registered in Russia is mandatory. FSTEC cybersecurity certification applies to regulated-sector devices, and Federal Law 149-FZ imposes data localization obligations on connected services.
answer_first.zh: 进入俄罗斯的无线设备须持有涵盖TR EAEU 037/2016（无线电设备）、TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低压电气安全）的EAC合格声明，并加贴EAC标志。消费类Wi-Fi和蓝牙产品须向Roskomnadzor申请无线电干扰（RFI）许可或完成备案通知。含5GHz W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）频段的设备须加贴「仅限室内使用」限制标签。电气规格为220–230V/50Hz，使用C/F型插头。中国CE、CCC及FCC文件均不被承认。须有在俄罗斯登记的当地授权进口商或代表。FSTEC网络安全认证适用于受监管行业设备，第149-FZ号联邦法律对联网服务规定了数据本地化义务。
answer_first.zht: 進入俄羅斯的無線設備須持有涵蓋TR EAEU 037/2016（無線電設備）、TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）及TR EAEU 004/2011（低壓電氣安全）的EAC合格聲明，並加貼EAC標誌。消費類Wi-Fi和藍牙產品須向Roskomnadzor申請無線電干擾（RFI）許可或完成備案通知。含5GHz W52（5.15–5.25GHz）或W53（5.25–5.35GHz）頻段的設備須加貼「僅限室內使用」限制標籤。電氣規格為220–230V/50Hz，使用C/F型插頭。中國CE、CCC及FCC文件均不被承認。須有在俄羅斯登記的當地授權進口商或代表。FSTEC網路安全認證適用於受監管行業設備，第149-FZ號聯邦法律對聯網服務規定了數據本地化義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
